title: Wears a Sheen of Ice
summary: You command the wintery power of cold and ice.
tiers: Tier 3: Freezing Touch or Ice Creation
Tier 6: Ice Storm or Winter Gauntlets
gm_intrusions: Ice makes surfaces slippery. Extreme cold causes objects to crack and break.
text: You command the wintery power of cold and ice.
details: You command the wintery power of cold and ice.
